category_sources: source_facts.description says snooze runs a command at a particular time; official README documents command scheduling syntax.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub README identify the project as snooze.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains usage syntax and scheduling examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/snort3/snort3, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official Snort homepage describes IPS/IDS, packet sniffing, packet logging, and rules-based network activity detection.
